---
title: "Crash Map"
subtitle: "Recorded bike and pedestrian crashes in Ventura County"
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
```

Each dot represents a recorded crash involving a cyclist or pedestrian in Ventura County. Data is sourced from SWITRS using CHP reports and covers **1/1/2020 – 3/31/2026**. Click any dot for date, location, and severity details.

```{=html}
<div class="map-legend">
  <span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#2563eb"></span>Bike crash</span>
  <span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#d4622a"></span>Pedestrian crash</span>
  <span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#7c3aed"></span>Bike + Pedestrian</span>
  <span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#6b7280"></span>Other</span>
</div>
```

```{r}
#| label: full-crash-map
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

severity_labels <- c(
  "1" = "Fatal",
  "2" = "Severe Injury",
  "3" = "Other Injury",
  "4" = "Property Damage Only",
  "0" = "Unknown"
)

crashes <- read_csv("data/Crashes.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    lat = coalesce(LATITUDE, POINT_Y),
    lon = coalesce(LONGITUDE, POINT_X)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(lat), !is.na(lon), lat != 0, lon != 0) |>
  mutate(
    crash_type = case_when(
      BICYCLE_ACCIDENT == "Y" & PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Both",
      BICYCLE_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Bike",
      PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Pedestrian",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    color = case_when(
      crash_type == "Bike"       ~ "#2563eb",
      crash_type == "Pedestrian" ~ "#d4622a",
      crash_type == "Both"       ~ "#7c3aed",
      TRUE                       ~ "#6b7280"
    ),
    sev_label = severity_labels[as.character(COLLISION_SEVERITY)],
    sev_label = coalesce(sev_label, "Unknown"),
    road = paste0(
      coalesce(PRIMARY_RD, "Unknown road"),
      if_else(!is.na(SECONDARY_RD) & SECONDARY_RD != "- ", paste0(" & ", SECONDARY_RD), "")
    ),
    label = paste0(
      "<b>", road, "</b>",
      "<br><span style='color:#555;font-size:0.85em'>",
        coalesce(CITY, ""), " · ", coalesce(as.character(COLLISION_DATE), ""),
      "</span>",
      "<br style='margin-bottom:4px'>",
      "<span style='background:", color, ";color:#fff;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.8em;font-weight:600'>",
        crash_type,
      "</span>",
      "<span style='color:#555;font-size:0.82em;margin-left:6px'>", sev_label, "</span>"
    )
  )

leaflet(crashes, width = "100%", height = "620px") |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = filter(crashes, crash_type == "Bike"),
    lng = ~lon, lat = ~lat,
    radius = 5, color = "#fff", weight = 1.2,
    fillColor = "#2563eb", fillOpacity = 0.82,
    popup = ~label,
    group = "Bike"
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = filter(crashes, crash_type == "Pedestrian"),
    lng = ~lon, lat = ~lat,
    radius = 5, color = "#fff", weight = 1.2,
    fillColor = "#d4622a", fillOpacity = 0.82,
    popup = ~label,
    group = "Pedestrian"
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = filter(crashes, crash_type == "Both"),
    lng = ~lon, lat = ~lat,
    radius = 6, color = "#fff", weight = 1.5,
    fillColor = "#7c3aed", fillOpacity = 0.9,
    popup = ~label,
    group = "Both"
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = filter(crashes, crash_type == "Other"),
    lng = ~lon, lat = ~lat,
    radius = 4, color = "#fff", weight = 1,
    fillColor = "#6b7280", fillOpacity = 0.65,
    popup = ~label,
    group = "Other"
  ) |>
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = c("Bike", "Pedestrian", "Both", "Other"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors  = c("#2563eb", "#d4622a", "#7c3aed", "#6b7280"),
    labels  = c("Bike", "Pedestrian", "Both", "Other"),
    title   = "Crash Type",
    opacity = 0.9
  ) |>
  addResetMapButton() |>
  addFullscreenControl()
```

```{r}
#| label: crash-summary-table
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)

crashes_raw <- read_csv("data/Crashes.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

summary_tbl <- crashes_raw |>
  mutate(
    crash_type = case_when(
      BICYCLE_ACCIDENT == "Y" & PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Both",
      BICYCLE_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Bike",
      PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Pedestrian",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  count(crash_type, name = "Count") |>
  arrange(desc(Count)) |>
  rename(`Crash Type` = crash_type)

kable(summary_tbl, format.args = list(big.mark = ","), caption = "Crashes by type in dataset")
```
